title: The inn refuge is temporary
description: The inn barrier can block tracking only for one night. After dawn, pursuers can lock onto the location again.

title: Using the pill reveals abnormal spiritual traces
description: The rare pill releases an abnormal pulse when used, making the user's background and value easier to trace.

title: Senior Brother will not stay passive once danger is obvious
description: If he confirms the protagonist is collapsing, he will intervene even against resistance.
